ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type (e.g., shooting, taser incident) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threat_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the threat level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the threat level (e.g., attack, other) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threat level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleeing_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fleeing status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleeing status (e.g., fleeing, not fleeing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fleeing status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tag */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., use of force, mental health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officer_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the training record */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who received training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training received (e.g., de-escalation, firearms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)
